name: M1908 Mondragon || The regretful officer
description:
A regretful officer.

hi-key i made this because the m1908 is one of (if not) my most favorite rifle in grave digger, and because her colours are perfect for my colour palette :3

oh and because she’s hot but that’s not important.

i didn’t actually have to make my own personality for this as she (a character that appears in the lore like once or twice) has a quite in-depth lore i can get from both her quotes and such to her actual bio.

this one was lowk done in 1 hour with one slick hand

ummm oh uh my gf lowk kinda sounds like her... and looks like her... i think you can get my type from that sentence alone...

i left it ambiguous to who she regrets, if the llm spouts bs, just reroll.

changelog 1: made her less hostile.
